ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., spectrometer, interferometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number for unique identification */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration event */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration event */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "calibration_certificate" TEXT /* Path to the calibration certificate document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument making the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement event */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the measurement in degrees */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the measurement */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_result" TEXT /* Result of the measurement (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "measurement_certificate" TEXT /* Path to the measurement certificate document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angles" (
  "angle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angular adjustment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement event */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the measurement in degrees */,
  "cosθ" REAL /* Cosine of the angle in radians */,
  "cos2θ" REAL /* Cosine squared of the angle in radians */,
  "sinθ" REAL /* Sine of the angle in radians */,
  "sin2θ" REAL /* Sine squared of the angle in radians */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angles_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., scientist, technician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being configured */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration event */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the configuration event */,
  "configured_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the configuration */,
  "configuration_method" TEXT /* Method used for configuration */,
  "configuration_result" TEXT /* Result of the configuration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "configuration_certificate" TEXT /* Path to the configuration certificate document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_configurations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_configurations_configured_by FOREIGN KEY ("configured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version event */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration event */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version event */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "version_change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_versions_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES calibrations ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
